props.heading: Build your website by talking to it.
props.subheading: Describe what you want — a page, a brand, a whole blog — and Atelier composes it in front of you, section by section. Refine it in plain words. Publish when it feels right. Own every pixel, forever.

items.label: from a fresh install to your first published page
lock-in — it's open source, and it's yours

props.heading: A studio, not an admin panel.
props.subheading: Three ways of working, one conversation. Atelier proposes; you approve and publish. Nothing goes live without your yes.

features.title: Talk, don't dig
features.body: Create, find and edit content by asking — no forms to hunt through, no fields to memorise. Brief it like you'd brief a designer, and refine the result line by line.

features.title: One brand, everywhere
features.body: Set your colour, type and tone once. Every section, every page, and the chrome around them reskin to match — with contrast checks so it always stays readable.

features.title: Blocks that behave
features.body: Heroes, features, pricing, galleries, FAQs and more — composed into real pages that respect your brand. No blank canvas, no broken layouts.

props.heading: Describe it. Watch it build.
props.body: Open a page, say what it's for, and Atelier lays it out in a live preview while you watch — opener, story, proof, close. Want it in a different order? Say so. Warmer, shorter, bolder? Just ask. When it looks right, you publish. Underneath it's plain Drupal, so a developer can open the hood any time.

props.heading: Your brand, on every page — from one decision.
props.body: Choose your colours, your type, your tone in the brand studio. It flows through every component, every page, and the site chrome — even this page you're reading now. Change one colour and the whole site follows, with built-in WCAG contrast checks so nothing turns unreadable. One brand, held consistently, without you having to police it.
props.cta_label: Log in to open the brand studio

props.heading: Made by conversation. Owned by you.
props.subheading: No per-seat pricing. No lock-in. Just Drupal — with a studio on top that speaks your language.

questions.question: Do I need to know Drupal?
questions.answer: No. You work by talking to the studio in plain language. Underneath it's standard Drupal, so a developer can take over whenever you like — nothing is hidden or proprietary.

questions.question: Is my site locked into Atelier?
questions.answer: Never. Atelier is open source. Your content, configuration and theme are all standard Drupal — export them, host them anywhere, walk away any time. What you build is yours.

questions.question: Can I use my own brand?
questions.answer: Yes. Set your colours, fonts and tone in the brand studio and every page reskins to match. Bring a finished brand, or discover one as you go.

questions.question: What does it cost?
questions.answer: Atelier itself is free and open source. You connect your own AI provider key, so you pay your provider directly for what you use — no markup, no seats, no surprises.

props.heading: Build something that's yours.
props.subheading: Log in and compose your first page in about the time it takes to describe it.
